query:
INSERT INTO pplns_payout_history
             ("blockHeight", address, "paidSats", percent, "rowType", "createdAt")
           SELECT * FROM UNNEST(
             $1::int[], $2::text[], $3::bigint[], $4::real[], $5::text[], $6::bigint[]
           )
           ON CONFLICT ("blockHeight", address) DO NOTHING
